segments.text: You know, nearly 30,000 startups apply to Y Combinator every batch. [music] But you can skip that entire line. Let me tell you how. So Y Combinator, the
startup [music] accelerator behind Airbnb, Ready and Stripe is coming to India with startup school for the first time. That is big. But on the sidelines,
something even bigger is happening. WCON India on April 16th and 17th in Bangalore where 300 [music] of India's top builders will be handpicked.
Founders, solopreneurs, business owners, people who can actually build, ship,
[music] and compete. And here's what at stake. The winner will get a direct interview for an upcoming Y Combinator badge. You could literally white code
your way to a YC interview now, skipping the application route altogether. Plus,
there will be cash prizes for the top three. You'll get visibility among judges from YC, Emergent and Razer Pay and a chance to be on a billboard in Bangalore.
